zh.lifeSummary: 當Goditha Throckmorton於大約1505年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾希加-福雷斯時，她的父親Sir George Throckmorton26歲，母親Katherine Vaux18歲。她於1524年與Thomas Neale II在英國諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1569年在英國貝德福爾也爾登享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Goditha Throckmorton于大约1505年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾希加-福雷斯时，她的父亲Sir George Throckmorton26岁，母亲Katherine Vaux18岁。她于1524年与Thomas Neale II在英国諾薩普頓史爾希加姆 費雷斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1569年在英国貝德福爾也爾登享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Goditha Throckmorton was born about 1505, in Higham-Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir George Throckmorton, was 26 and her mother, Katherine Vaux, was 18. She married Thomas Neale II in 1524, in Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1569, in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Goditha Throckmorton est née environ 1505, à Higham-Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir George Throckmorton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Katherine Vaux, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Neale II en 1524, à Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1569, à Yelden, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Goditha Throckmorton um 1505 in Higham-Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Throckmorton 26 und ihre Mutter Katherine Vaux 18. Sie hat 1524 in Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England Thomas Neale II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1569 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Goditha Throckmorton è nata il circa 1505 nel Higham-Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir George Throckmorton, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Katherine Vaux, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Neale II nel 1524, nel Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1569, nel Yelden, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Goditha Throckmortonが約1505年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヒガム-フエレルズで生まれた時，父Sir George Throckmortonは26歳，母Katherine Vauxは18歳であった。1524年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヒガム フエレルズでThomas Neale IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1569年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアイエルデンで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Goditha Throckmorton(이)가 대략 1505년 영국 노르섬프토실르 히그함-페레르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Throckmorton(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Vaux(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1524년 영국 노르섬프토실르 히그함 페레르스에서 Thomas Neale II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1569년 영국 베드퍼드실르 옐든에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Goditha Throckmorton nasceu aproximadamente 1505, em Higham-Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir George Throckmorton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Vaux, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Neale II em 1524, em Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1569, em Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Goditha Throckmorton родилась около 1505 г. в местности хаиам-фиррирс, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir George Throckmorton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Vaux, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Neale II в 1524 г. в местности хаиам фиррирс, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1569 г. в местности иелден, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Goditha Throckmorton nació aproximadamente 1505, en Higham-Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir George Throckmorton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Katherine Vaux, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Thomas Neale II en 1524, en Higham Ferrers, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1569, en Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años.
